channel.title: Our Programs on Wesole Nutki - Preschool
channel.description: Recent content in Our Programs on Wesole Nutki - Preschool

item.title: Toddler Group
item.description: First step into preschool adventure. Gentle introduction to group life, developing independence and basic social skills.

item.title: Preschool Group
item.description: Developing curiosity about the world and social skills. Intensive learning through play, fostering creativity and building self-confidence.

item.title: Pre-K Group
item.description: Intensive preparation for school learning. Developing reading, writing, and math skills while maintaining the joy of learning.

item.title: Kindergarten
item.description: Last year before school. Comprehensive preparation for elementary school, developing all key competencies.

item.title: Daily Schedule
item.description: Our preschool day is carefully planned to provide children with optimal conditions for learning, play, and rest. The schedule is flexible and adapted to the needs of different age groups.
